chat.title: Glow Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! ✨ I'm the Glow assistant. I'll help you with AI photo retouching or navigating the site!
chat.mock_services_1: Upload your work photo — our neural network will create a magazine-quality retouch in seconds, preserving skin texture!
chat.mock_services_2: AI retouching is our main service! Upload a photo and get a professional result instantly ✨
chat.mock_services_3: We use AI for beauty photo retouching: skin tone evening, smoothing, and natural look preservation.
chat.mock_services_4: Results in seconds — no Photoshop or manual editing needed. Try uploading a photo!
chat.mock_services_5: Details about retouching and pricing are on the main page. Check it out!
chat.mock_services_6: Want to learn more about how AI retouching works? Just ask!
chat.mock_nav_1: On the main page you can upload a photo and try AI retouching. Go there?
chat.mock_nav_2: Click 'Login' in the top right corner. No account yet? Registration takes a minute!
chat.mock_nav_3: Contact us via WhatsApp or check the contacts page!
chat.mock_support_1: Tell me more — what do you need help with? Photo upload, retouch results, or a technical issue?
chat.mock_support_2: Write us on WhatsApp — a manager will reply quickly! The link is on the contacts page.
chat.mock_support_3: Upload a photo on the main page — AI will process it automatically. It's easy!
chat.mock_support_4: Need help with retouching? Upload a photo — I'll guide you to the best result!
chat.mock_portfolio_1: Check out before/after examples — see how AI retouching transforms photos!
chat.mock_portfolio_2: Want to see results? The main page has real before and after retouch examples!
chat.mock_portfolio_3: Our neural network preserves natural skin texture — no plastic effect ✨
chat.mock_general_1: Hi! ✨ I'm the Glow assistant. How can I help?
chat.mock_general_2: Hello! Glad to see you on Glow. What are you looking for?
chat.mock_general_4: Happy to help! Reach out anytime 💫
chat.mock_general_6: Super! If you have questions — I'm right here 💫
chat.mock_general_7: I'm the Glow virtual assistant ✨ I help with AI photo retouching and site navigation!
chat.mock_default_1: Interesting question! Our managers can help better — want to contact them?
chat.mock_default_2: I didn't quite get that 😅 Try rephrasing or choose an action below!
chat.mock_default_3: Happy to help! Specify what exactly you are interested in ✨
